description: Skill bundle for the TVB research wiki: automated ingestion, static site generation, and AI-powered content enrichment using Feynman research skills.

skills.name: tvb-wiki-maintenance
skills.description: Full pipeline for maintaining the TVB research wiki: hourly arXiv ingestion, static site build, git commit, and GitHub Pages deployment.

skills.name: tvb-wiki-ingestion
skills.description: arXiv paper ingestion for the TVB research wiki: fetch new papers, extract entities/concepts, update raw/ and meta/.

skills.name: tvb-wiki-static-site
skills.description: Build and deploy the TVB research wiki as a static site using MkDocs and GitHub Pages.

skills.name: wiki-content-enrichment
skills.description: Fill placeholder wiki content using Feynman deep research. Analyzes pages needing content, generates research commands, integrates findings.

skills.name: wiki-literature-review
skills.description: Generate literature reviews for wiki concepts using Feynman /lit workflow. Creates cited summaries for concept pages.

skills.name: wiki-paper-integration
skills.description: Find and integrate relevant papers from alphaXiv into wiki pages. Links papers to concepts and entities.

skills.name: wiki-comparison-generator
skills.description: Generate comparison pages (TVB vs NEST, fMRI vs EEG, etc.) using Feynman deep research.

hermes.notes: Skills can be loaded directly from the repo's skills/ directory.

pi.notes: Feynman commands (/lit, /deepresearch, /audit) can be used to fill wiki content. Run scripts/feynman_wiki_pipeline.py for batch enrichment.

codex.notes: Codex can read the SKILL.md files and execute the described steps.

installation.hermes: Copy skills directory to ~/.hermes/skills/ or symlink: ln -s $(pwd)/skills/tvb-wiki-* ~/.hermes/skills/
installation.pi: Clone the repo and add its skills directory to Pi's skill search path.
installation.generic: Read SKILL.md files from skills/ directory and follow instructions.
